meaning: adj.多话的,爱说话的,多嘴的
examples: He's a talkative guy, and I struck up a conversation with him.
He suddenly became very talkative, his face slightly flushed, his eyes much brighter.
Both male and female participants were guilty of discriminating against talkative women, she notes.
Dave Herbert was a stocky, talkative building contractor in an Ohio State athletic jersey.
